title: OrthoCamera (Unofficial NeoForge Port)
description: Unofficial NeoForge port of DimasKama's OrthoCamera Fabric mod
body:
This is an unofficial NeoForge port of [DimasKama's OrthoCamera mod for Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/orthocamera), whch is [licensed under the MIT license](https://github.com/DimasKama/OrthoCamera/blob/1.21/LICENSE). For now, this project aims to be purely a port, though new features or changes may be added eventually. As this port is unofficial, please do not report any issues to the original mod's issue tracker. Instead, any issues should be reported to the linked issue tracker.

This mod adds a configurable orthographic view, enabling the player to see the world in a totally new way. This mod is intended mostly for specific photo or video purposes rather than a constant experience.

![Orthographic view of a village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62c2684e3c61c97070daf096ad0528f233ad6859_0.webp)

Note: Sodium's "block fase culling" may cause issues when in orthographic mode. Disable that setting to resolve issues.
